title: spergula arvensis var. maxima
intro: Spergula arvensis var. maxima, commonly known as burr medic or greater burr medic, is a perennial plant in the family Polygonaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. Its medicinal properties are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried extract, which are commonly used in herbal remedies for their purported health benefits.
